lessons.title: Grammar of Graphics and Basic ggplot
lessons.description: Understand the layered grammar of graphics and create your first ggplot.

lessons.title: Aesthetics and Geometric Objects
lessons.description: Map variables to visual properties and choose the right geom.

lessons.title: Common Geoms: Histogram, Boxplot, Bar Chart
lessons.description: Create histograms, boxplots, and bar charts with geom_* functions.

lessons.title: Customizing Scales, Labels, and Themes
lessons.description: Add titles, axis labels, change colors, and apply themes.

lessons.title: Faceting and Saving Plots
lessons.description: Create multi-panel plots with faceting and save your plots to files.
